title: TntCartCounter
description: Counts how many TNT Minecarts you currently have in your inventory.
body:
![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/wzoMk0Sc/images/9e17285f2994e4136380ef985bef6a621f1ce9b8.png)

**TNT Cart Counter** is a lightweight client-side HUD mod heavily inspired by [TotemCounter](https://modrinth.com/mod/totemcounter).  
Never lose track of your TNT Minecarts again.

##  **Features:**

- Displays the total number of TNT Minecarts in your inventory directly on your screen
- Move the HUD position anywhere on the screen
- The count changes color based on how many you have.
- Toggle the mod on/off or disable colors entirely via the config screen
